response.justification: Mohammed has deep technical expertise, extensive open-source contributions, and broad experience across languages and architectures — particularly strong in Linux, TypeScript, and system design — but lacks demonstrated leadership in IT consulting, formal project management, and UML modeling, and his German proficiency is only basic, falling short of the C1 requirement.
strengths: Extensive open-source contributions with GISCollective and DLang libraries demonstrating passion for open tech and digital sovereignty.
Proven full-stack experience across Linux, Node.js, TypeScript, Docker, and microservices in high-scale environments.
Strong track record of mentoring and creating technical workshops, indicating communication and knowledge-sharing ability.
concerns: German language proficiency is listed as 'Basic', not meeting the mandatory C1 requirement for client advisory and leadership.
No explicit evidence of IT architecture design, UML modeling, or requirements management in consulting contexts.
Lacks clear demonstration of executive-level project leadership, team management, or client-facing technical advisory experience.
